title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese presents six skills for maximizing Claude project output: web scraping, knowledge base ingestion, system improvement, board consultation, focus group testing, and compound engineering. He demonstrates the workflow by building a fitness trainer project and advocates for systematic approaches to AI-assisted development.
